mapper.sql: fc.collection_id, fc.user_id, fc.name, fc.description, fc.visibility, fc.sort_no, fc.created_time, fc.updated_time, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite_collection_items i WHERE i.collection_id = fc.collection_id ) AS item_count
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM favorite_collections fc WHERE fc.user_id = #{userId} AND fc.name = '默认收藏' LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM favorite_collections fc WHERE fc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY fc.sort_no, fc.created_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite_collections ( user_id, name, description, visibility, sort_no ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{visibility}, COALESCE(#{sortNo}, 100) )
INSERT IGNORE INTO favorite_collections ( user_id, name, description, visibility, sort_no ) VALUES ( #{userId}, '默认收藏', '临时保存，稍后再整理。', 'PRIVATE', 0 )
